title: Defender (hilt)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Defender}}
[[File:JKA_saber8.png|thumb|right|250px|The Defender hilt]]
'''Defender''' was a basic tapered [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|hilt]] used in the [[New Jedi Order]] by [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].

*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
